# `/tag` Command
Manages tags stored in entities.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/tag <entity: target> <action: TagChangeAction> <name: TagValues>`

### `/tag <entity: target> list`

## Arguments
- `action`: TagChangeAction
- `entity`: target
- `name`: TagValues

## Enums
### `TagChangeAction`

#### Values
- `add`
- `remove`
